query: SELECT c.id, c.tenant_id as claim_tenant, a.tenant_id as assessment_tenant, a.id as assessment_id FROM claims c LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 3;
